hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'supabase.*\(migration\|db push\|db reset\)\|npx supabase migration' && echo '⚠️  MIGRATION DETECTED!

Safety Checklist:
- RLS policies defined for new tables?
- SECURITY DEFINER functions reviewed?
- Migration tested locally first?
- Rollback plan documented?
- No PII in migration (passwords, tokens, etc.)?
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'gcloud builds submit' && echo '⚠️  DEPLOY DETECTED!

Confirm with user before proceeding.
Deploy is a manual, user-initiated action only.
' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE 'git (push.*--force|push.*-f[^i]|reset.*--hard)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive git operation detected!

git push --force and git reset --hard can destroy work.
Use safer alternatives:
- git push --force-with-lease (safer force push)
- git reset --soft (keeps changes staged)

If you must proceed, ask the user for explicit confirmation.
' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(backup|bak|old|~)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Manual backup files violate "Git is backup" principle.

Use Git instead:
- git show HEAD~1:path/to/file (view previous version)
- git checkout [commit] -- path/to/file (restore version)
- git diff HEAD~1 path/to/file (compare changes)
' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(env|env\.local|env\.production)$' && echo '⚠️  ENV FILE WRITE DETECTED!

Verify no secrets/API keys are being committed.
Use Supabase Secrets or GCP Secret Manager for sensitive values.
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'git commit' && [ "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ] && printf '⚠️  COMMIT ON MAIN DETECTED!

Standard/Complex tasks MUST use a git worktree:
  git worktree add .worktrees/<branch-name> -b <branch-name>

Only Micro tasks (1-5 lines, 1 file) may commit directly to main.
If this is NOT a micro task, create a worktree first.
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'git commit' && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && [ "$STAGED" -gt 3 ] && printf '🧠 BRAINSTORM CHECK: %s files staged!

For changes touching >3 files:
- Was superpowers:brainstorming invoked?
- Was a plan created in docs/plans/?
- Is this really a Micro task?
' "$STAGED" || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'gh pr create' && printf '📋 PR CREATION CHECKLIST:

- npm run build passed? (FRESH output)
- npm run typecheck passed? (FRESH output)
- npm run test passed? (FRESH output)
- superpowers:verification-before-completion invoked?
- superpowers:requesting-code-review invoked?
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'gh pr merge' && printf '⚠️  PR MERGE — VERIFY FIRST:

- All PR comments addressed?
- CI checks passing?
- User explicitly approved merge?
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q '^git checkout' && echo '
📍 Branch switched!

Reminder:
1. Run: git pull origin main (sync)
2. Check active work: git log main..HEAD --oneline
3. Check issues: gh issue list --assignee @me
' || true
